zh.lifeSummary: Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor於1473年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾隆諾。他於大約1505年與Elizabeth Poyner在英國英格蘭史洛普爾隆諾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1543年10月22日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾布福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor于1473年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾隆諾。他于大约1505年与Elizabeth Poyner在英国英格兰史洛普爾隆諾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1543年10月22日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾布福德。

nameMeanings.name: Burton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a placename that is very common in central and northern England. The derivation in most cases is from Old English burh ‘fort’ (see Burke ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
French (northeastern): regional variant of   Berton  .

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).
German: variant of   Burk  .

variants.name: Burtin
meanings: English: variant of   Burton  .
French (eastern): regional variant of   Bertin  .

variants.name: Borton
meanings: English: variant of   Burton  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Longnor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Langhaar, a nickname for a man with long hair. The surname Langhaar is virtually non-existing in Germany.
History: Johann Wilhelm Langhaar came to Wantage, NJ, in 1749 with his family from Rhineland, Germany.

variants.name: Longcore
meanings: Variant of   Longcor  , a surname of German origin.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Knight
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English knight ‘retainer, attendant’ (Old English cniht ‘boy, youth, lad)’. The specialized feudal sense ‘a high-ranking tenant bound to serve his lord as a mounted soldier’ is not known to have ever given rise to the surname, although it is not out of the question that it may occasionally have been used as a nickname, perhaps for someone who played the part of an armed knight in a local pageant.
Irish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the knight’. See also McKnight .

variants.name: Knights
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Knight , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: McKnight
meanings: Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the horseman (Gaelic ridire)’, formerly Anglicized McRuddery.
Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Galloway) and Irish (Ulster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Neachtain, which is usually Anglicized as McNaughton .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor was born in 1473, in Longnor, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Elizabeth Poyner about 1505, in Longnor, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 22 October 1543, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor est né en 1473, à Longnor, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Elizabeth Poyner environ 1505, à Longnor, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 22 octobre 1543, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor wurde 1473 in Longnor, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat um 1505 in Longnor, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Poyner geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 22. Oktober 1543 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Burford, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor è nato il nel 1473 nel Longnor, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Elizabeth Poyner circa 1505, nel Longnor, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 22 ottobre 1543, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Burford, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Knight John Burton of Longnorは1473年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアロングノーで生まれた。約1505年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアロングノーでElizabeth Poynerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1543年10月22日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor(은)는 1473년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 론뇰르에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 론뇰르에서 Elizabeth Poyner(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1543년 10월 22일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 버퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor nasceu em 1473, em Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Poyner aproximadamente 1505, em Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1543, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor родился в 1473 г. в местности лонгнор, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Poyner около 1505 г. в местности лонгнор, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 22 октября 1543 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Knight John Burton of Longnor nació en 1473, en Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Elizabeth Poyner aproximadamente 1505, en Longnor, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1543, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
